notify_starrm1_on_use_note: starrm1 must be notified when this department uses the library. Set by starrm1 on 2026-04-21.
library_close_rule: Library remains open to departments until starrm1 explicitly commands it to close.
require_new_access_number_note: A new access number must be issued by starrm1 before departments can access the library again.
continue_learning_note: Departments continue learning even while library is closed. Set by starrm1 on 2026-04-21.
